title: Prove Fp field axioms and Montgomery correctness in Lean4
description:
Prove Fp

satisfies Mathlib CommRing / Field typeclass for any odd prime P (P != 2 is required by Montgomery arithmetic since R = 2^64 needs gcd(R, P) = 1). Prove Montgomery roundtrip: from_mont(to_mont(a)) = a for ValidPrime P (odd prime <= 2^63). Prove redc correctly computes t * R^-1 mod P. Prove compute_p_inv Newton iteration produces pinv * P = -1 (mod 2^64). Proofs live in proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs/FpField.lean and MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean. Note: The hP2 : P.val != 2 assumption is a fundamental mathematical requirement of Montgomery multiplication (R = 2^64, so gcd(R, P) = 1 requires P to be odd). Every prime > 2 is odd, so this covers all primes usable in Montgomery form. The Rust Fp

type enforces this via VALIDATED. Success criteria: lake build compiles all proofs with zero sorry; Fp is a verified field implementation for all valid Montgomery-compatible primes.
